purpose: Two-certificate Gate A with declared relational coverage in both the controlled primary batch and the hidden-change online policy.

online_policy_feasible_certificate.action_selection: derive same-condition relation groups from every declared material intervention; select one fit-ranked realizable group per declaration; fill the four-action policy set using predictive-fit-only information; execute the final set in canonical order without phase input
online_policy_feasible_certificate.reference_policy: retain each selected action's first observation and global experiment index; a cross-action relation may cold-start an action only while that action has no same-action reference; all later evidence for that action uses its own temporal reference
online_policy_feasible_certificate.evidence_policy: select eight whole public-summary blocks per evidence channel from predictive-fit samples only; use exactly one absolute, same-action temporal, or cross-action relational likelihood channel per experiment; choose transition versus stable semantics from the latent change-point hypothesis and reference age; never expose phase, reset, or hidden truth

action_library.batch_selection: fit-only information ranking subject to declared relational coverage at the controlled primary budget

paired_phase_design.budget_interpretation: Budget 2 is the online-history-aligned stress point. Gate A controls at budget 4 with four matched references and four diagnostics in the controlled certificate and the actual two-reference history plus four post-change experiments in the online certificate.

final_online_development.interpretation: The n=20 development cohort supports method freeze but cannot satisfy every formal Wilson lower bound; no formal claim is made.

development_calibration.selection_basis: RC20 failed the online reaction material family because its evidence model had no cross-action relational channel. RC21 development added task-agnostic relation groups, fit-only cross-action predictives, one likelihood channel per experiment, and cold-start-only relational reference use. A separate controlled development negative control showed that library availability alone did not force the active batch to close a material relation, so the final primary controlled selector also requires one complete public relation per declared material intervention. All development namespaces are excluded from formal RC21.

public_feature_contract.source: agent-visible numeric observation and reward after every compiled public recipe operation in the controlled matched and actual hidden-change campaigns
public_feature_contract.encoding: Each experiment is summarized into four-value blocks per sorted public scalar. Controlled primary batches must close every declared material relation and use matched post-minus-pre summaries. Online evidence uses one absolute, same-action temporal, or cold-start cross-action relational channel, with transition/stable semantics selected by latent reference age. Every feature and action ranking uses predictive-fit samples only.
public_feature_contract.active_action_source: fit-only information ranking constrained by declared relation coverage at the controlled primary budget; online selection uses the same declarations and a fixed canonical cycle
public_feature_contract.fixed_trajectory_action_source: first k actions in the frozen deterministic action library

supersession_reason: RC21 supersedes RC20 after the diagnostic action design was versioned. It retains the physical tasks, interventions, budgets, thresholds, no-change controls, feature blocks, and dimension-normalized likelihood. It adds explicit task-agnostic relational evidence and requires actual relation closure in the controlled primary batch. RC20 and all development evidence remain immutable and non-controlling.

rate_law_response_certificate.pass_rule: Every frozen public catalyst-dose response must remain within the declared multiplier envelope and the set must contain responses on both sides of unity.

decision_relevance_certificate.pass_rule: For every required metric, median max effect must exceed its threshold and either old-policy regret or optimal-action change rate must exceed its threshold.
